response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of hands-on engineering experience across a wide range of platforms and a genuine entrepreneurial streak, and his current role at re:cinq shows real engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, enterprise customer advisory, and cloud product strategy influence — areas where his resume shows little evidence. His AI work is recent and implementation-level rather than strategic, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career narrative is that of a skilled practitioner rather than a principal-level strategist who inspires teams and advises large customers on AI adoption.
strengths: ~20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Active, hands-on AI and agentic work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Consistent entrepreneurial pattern: founded GISCollective, built and shipped open-source platforms, delivered public talks at technical conferences
concerns: No advanced degree in AI or a related field; academic background is a CS bachelor's and a fine arts degree, well below the preferred PhD/Master's
No visible track record of advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, or operating at a director-level scope of influence
Current and recent titles (senior/staff engineer) reflect a senior individual contributor, not a director-level IC expected to inspire cross-organizational initiatives and drive AI strategy
